---
title: "Posts"
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
  date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
page-layout: full
---

Notes, tutorials, and research updates on nonlinear analysis, OpenSees, GPU computing, and earthquake engineering.
